---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: [username]
---

## Feature Summary
Provide a concise summary of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Explain why this feature is important and who it benefits.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the proposed implementation or behaviour in detail.

## Alternatives Considered
List other ideas or approaches you considered.

## Benefits
Explain the benefits and user impact of this feature.

## Acceptance Criteria
Define clear, testable criteria for when this feature is considered complete.

## Additional Context
Add screenshots, mockups, or external links that help explain the request.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 13.1]
- Version: [e.g. v2.1.0]
- Node.js: [e.g. 20.x]
